commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=68", "wheel"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "monaco-ops-openenv"
version = "1.0.0"
requires-python = ">=3.11"
dependencies = [
    "openenv-core>=0.2.0",
    "fastapi>=0.111.0",
    "uvicorn[standard]>=0.29.0",
    "pydantic>=2.7.0",
    "openai>=1.30.0",
]

[project.scripts]
server = "server.app:main"
